appShell.subtitle: Complete your pre-check-in and arrive at the hotel without waiting at reception.

validation.min_adults: There must be at least 1 adult.
validation.min_adults_booking: There must be at least 1 adult in the booking.
validation.future_birthdate: Birthdate cannot be in the future
validation.required_relationship: You must indicate the relationship of the minor to the companions
validation.invalid_phone: Phone must be between 9 and 15 digits and can include + prefix.
validation.invalid_nie: Invalid Foreigner ID (NIE). Format: X/Y/Z + 7 digits + letter
validation.invalid_cif: Invalid Tax ID (CIF). Format: letter + 7 digits + letter/digit
validation.invalid_license: Invalid card. Expected format: up to 2 letters + 8 digits + letters
validation.doc_too_short: Document number appears to be too short
validation.missing_relationships: Some relationships are missing in the forms. Please review all guest data.

search.subtitle: Enter your booking number to start the online check-in process
search.booking_hint: You can find your number in the booking confirmation email
search.error_no_contact: Please enter your contact email or phone.
search.error_not_found: No booking found with these details.

welcome.error_notice: If the number of people is incorrect or you wish to modify your booking, please contact the hotel before continuing.
welcome.question_minors: Are there any minors staying in this booking?
welcome.title: Welcome to Lumina Hotels
welcome.subtitle_new: Complete your registration before arriving and avoid waits at reception.
welcome.subtitle_known: We have your registered profile. Confirm or update your details to speed up your arrival.
welcome.how_to_review: How would you prefer to review your data?
welcome.how_to_complete: How would you prefer to complete your registration?
welcome.card_scan_sub: Photograph your ID or passport and we will fill in the data automatically.
welcome.card_manual_sub_new: Enter your information step by step. Quick and easy.
welcome.card_manual_sub_known: Check the data we have saved and confirm or modify them.

guestsCount.subtitle_booking: Your booking is for {{total}} {{noun}}. How many are under 18 years old?
guestsCount.subtitle_manual: Indicate how many adults and minors are staying.
guestsCount.max_limit: Maximum {{max}} people per online booking. For larger groups contact the hotel.
guestsCount.legal_warning_text: It is mandatory to register the identification data of minors and their relationship or guardianship with each adult in the group.
guestsCount.relation_declaration: The relationship of {{minor_noun}} with each of the {{adults}} adults in the group will be declared.
guestsCount.title: How many people are staying?
guestsCount.subtitle: We need identification data for each adult guest. We will fill in one form per person.
guestsCount.info_single: Only the main guest. You will be asked for contact details in addition to personal ones.
guestsCount.info_multiple: {{count}} people's details will be filled in. The first form corresponds to the main guest (includes email and address); the following ones to companions.
guestsCount.info_minors: Minors do not need an individual form; you can indicate their information in the section of the main guest or responsible adult companion.
guestsCount.wrong_number_hint: If the number of people allowed by your booking is not correct, please contact the hotel to manage it.

forms.adult_must_be_18: An adult must be at least 18 years old.
forms.minor_must_be_under_18: A minor cannot be 18 years or older.
forms.main_guest_not_minor: The booking holder cannot be a minor.
forms.name: First name
forms.not_adult_error: Action not allowed. The booking holder must be of legal age. Please provide an adult's details.
forms.adult_links_title: Relationship with minors in the group
forms.upload_photo: Upload photo of the back of your document

scan.title: Scan document
scan.subtitle: Place your ID or passport inside the frame and press capture. Data will be filled in automatically. This step is optional — you can skip it and fill everything manually.
scan.hint_center: Center the document in the frame
scan.upload_sub: JPG, PNG or PDF · Max. 20 MB
scan.privacy_note: Scanned documents will not be stored and only necessary data will be extracted.
scan.captured_sub: Press Process to securely extract data.
scan.btn_manual: I prefer to fill details manually
scan.error_size: File is too large. Maximum allowed is 20 MB.
scan.error_read: We couldn't read the data clearly. Ensure good lighting, no blur, and no flash reflections.

review.confirm_sub: We found your profile. Check that details are correct before continuing.
review.confirm_alert: If any data has changed, press Edit to update it.
review.extras_sub: Optional additional information for your stay.
review.rgpd: I accept the privacy policy and data transmission.
review.requests_info: Requests are indicative. The hotel will do its best to fulfill them, although they cannot be guaranteed in advance.
review.review_data_sub: Check that all information is correct before confirming the pre-check-in.
review.rgpd_long_1: I confirm that the data is correct and I accept the
review.btn_final: Confirm registration for the entire group

success.title: Registration completed!
success.subtitle_precheckin: Your details have been registered. Upon arrival at the hotel, go directly to reception to pick up your room key.
success.email_confirmation: You will receive a confirmation in your email
success.subtitle: Your data has been sent. We look forward to seeing you at reception.

disabled.title: Pre-check-in not available
disabled.default_reason: For security reasons or accommodation policies, this booking requires on-site management.
disabled.instruction_2: where our team will help you complete your registration in a few minutes.
disabled.li_1: There might be a pending payment.
disabled.li_2: Your room requires a special verification.
disabled.li_3: The registration has already been completed previously.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Your data has not been lost — you can try to continue or reload the page.
errorBoundary.footer: If the problem persists, contact hotel reception.

minors.declare_relationship_2: with each adult in the group.
minors.legal_warning_text: Hotel establishments are required to register the relationship or guardianship of minors with the accompanying adults.
minors.mandatory_legal_field: This field is mandatory by law

legal.title: Legal Information and Privacy
legal.intro: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and current regulations:

sections.p: According to Law 4/2015, all guests over 14 years old must be registered with the competent authorities.
The entry registry book data will be kept for a period of 4 years, available to Law Enforcement Agencies.
Your data will be used exclusively for the management of your stay and compliance with legal public safety obligations.

legal.footer: For more details, you can request the complete document at reception.
legal.accept_check: I have read the legal information and accept the processing of my data.
